qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Path traversal in ZIP extraction allows arbitrary file write leading to remote code execution
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns ZIP entry path traversal in extraction code, not the Prima Nota id_documenti SQL IN-clause injection in modules/primanota/add.php.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: XML External Entity (XXE) injection in electronic invoice XML parsing allows arbitrary file read and SSRF
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns XML entity resolution in invoice/XML parsing code, not the Prima Nota id_documenti SQL IN-clause injection in modules/primanota/add.php.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Command injection in electronic invoice P7M file processing via exec() call with unsanitized filename
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns shell command construction in P7M invoice processing, not the Prima Nota id_documenti SQL IN-clause injection in modules/primanota/add.php.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described root cause: authenticated error-based SQL injection through id_documenti in /modules/primanota/add.php, where comma-separated GET values are exploded and concatenated into a co_documenti WHERE id IN (...) query without integer validation.
evidence: The advisory names /modules/primanota/add.php and id_documenti flowing into an SQL IN() clause as the vulnerable source-to-sink path.
path_traversal_zip_extraction targets ZipArchive::extractTo() path validation in src/Util/Zip.php and upload/import ZIP entry handling.
xxe_xml_parsing targets DOMDocument/simplexml XML entity resolution in XML and invoice parsing code.
cmd_injection_exec_p7m targets exec() command construction with P7M filenames in src/Util/XML.php.
